message:
refactor(tui): topology-driven search layout replaces ad-hoc breakpoint matching (1mfw3.4.2)

Replace match-on-LayoutBreakpoint branching in view() with topology-driven
if/else using SearchTopology.dual_pane. Inspector now shows topology details
(min widths, pane mode). Add 2 render tests covering all breakpoint tiers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
